calendar.matters:
Beneficiaries Petition For An Order Directing Successor Trustee, Gwendolyn Sacco To Purchase Each Beneficiary'S Interest Or To Sell Trust Realty
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cowan for petitioners Luzell Sander, Cynthia Estrada, Jasmine Coussainat, and Deanna Bessard.
Milla Lvovich for successor trustee Gwendolyn Anita Sacco (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Directing Successor Trustee to Purchase Each Beneficiary's Interest or to Sell Trust Realty.

The Court noted the length of time the petition had been pending and inquired regarding the delay in addressing deficiencies. Mr. Cowan reported that supplemental filings had recently been submitted, including updates regarding beneficiaries and related documentation, and attributed the delay to family circumstances and communication issues.

Ms. Lvovich stated that she had not been served with the recent filings and had not had an opportunity to review them. She further noted that certain petitioners were deceased and would need to be properly substituted as parties, and stated she would not object to the petition being denied or taken off calendar.

The parties addressed the status of the trust property, including prior possession of the property, remediation efforts, and potential sale or buyout. Ms. Lvovich reported that the trustee was proceeding with repairs and intended to sell the property. Mr. Cowan requested that the Court impose a time frame for resolution.

After hearing from the parties, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------
POST-SCRIPT (4/6/2026):

After further consideration, the Court ordered that the matter be taken off calendar.

Counsel who appeared at the hearing were notified of the Court's decision via email.
